calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-07-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:16am
Judge Pro Tem David Cummings, clerk-Beth Wilber, Nothing on reacord, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeals. There is no appearance by the Appellant, Eurotech Collision; Respondent, Kailen Neff, appears in Pro Per.
Ms. Neff, previously sworn, testifies in the narrative, and responds to questions from Judge Cummings.
Alex Miroshnichenko, previously sworn, resonds to questions from Judge Cummings.
EXHR(A) Estimate for work on auto
EXHR(B) Letter from auto specialist "City Paints"
EXHR(C) Letter from Mercedes-Benz
EXHR(D) Warranty from Eurotech
10:40am
Matter is submitted, newly marked evidence is retained

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-26-2010 Judgment Entered
